transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. I understand you need help with a specialist referral, is that right?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, my doctor said she'd send one to a cardiologist, but I haven't heard anything and it's been two weeks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can look into that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Marcus Feld, born June 3rd, 1968.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see Dr. Iyer submitted a referral to Coastline Cardiology on the 10th, but it looks like it's still pending insurance approval.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh, is there something I need to do?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No, but I can expedite it. I'll flag it as urgent with your plan, Horizon Silver PPO, and they typically respond within 48 hours.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great, I've been having some chest tightness.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, and I've noted that for priority review. Once approved, Coastline Cardiology will call you directly to schedule.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, and if they don't call by Friday?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Call us back and we'll follow up directly with the office. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that covers it. Thank you.
